mapper.select: SELECT A.BRD_CD , A.BRD_PROP_BINARY , A.BRD_NM , A.BRD_LIST_URL FROM TB_BBS_BRD A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd}

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.NOTICE_YN , A.RGT_USR_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM , A.VIEW_CNT FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.IDX DESC

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.PST_CNTS , A.BRD_CD , A.PST_LVL , A.ROT_PST_CD , A.RGT_USR_NM , A.NOTICE_YN , A.THUMB_URL , IFNULL(A.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM , B.BRD_PROP_BINARY , B.BRD_NM FROM TB_BBS_PST A INNER JOIN TB_BBS_BRD B ON A.BRD_CD = B.BRD_CD AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N'
AND A.PST_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.PST_CNTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY A.IDX DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N'
AND A.PST_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.PST_CNTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.PST_CNTS , A.BRD_CD , A.PST_LVL , A.NOTICE_YN , IFNULL(A.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , A.ROT_PST_CD , A.RGT_USR_NM , A.RGT_EMAIL , CASE WHEN #{encryptKey} IS NOT NULL AND #{encryptKey} != '' THEN F_COM_DECRYPT(A.RGT_PHONE, #{encryptKey}) ELSE A.RGT_PHONE END AS RGT_PHONE , A.ATCH_FILE_KEY , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM FROM TB_BBS_PST A INNER JOIN TB_BBS_BRD B ON A.BRD_CD = B.BRD_CD AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.PST_CD = #{pstCd}

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.PST_CNTS , A.PST_LVL , A.ROT_PST_CD , A.RGT_USR_NM , A.ATCH_FILE_KEY , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.ROT_PST_CD = #{pstCd} AND A.PST_LVL > 0 ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM ASC

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.BRD_CD , A.PST_LVL , A.ROT_PST_CD , A.RGT_USR_NM , IFNULL(A.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM , CASE WHEN A.PST_LVL = 0 THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST T WHERE T.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND T.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND T.PST_LVL > 0) ELSE 0 END AS REPLY_CNT FROM TB_BBS_PST A LEFT JOIN TB_BBS_PST P ON P.PST_CD = A.ROT_PST_CD AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N'
AND A.PST_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.PST_CNTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY P.RGT_DTM DESC , A.PST_LVL ASC , A.RGT_DTM ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N'
AND A.PST_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.PST_CNTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = #{brdCd} AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND A.PST_LVL = 0
AND A.PST_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.PST_CNTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT T.PST_CD, T.PST_NM, T.BRD_CD, T.THUMB_URL, T.VIEW_CNT, T.RGT_DTM, T.BRD_NM FROM ( SELECT A.PST_CD, A.PST_NM, A.BRD_CD, A.THUMB_URL, IFNULL(A.VIEW_CNT,0) AS VIEW_CNT, DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM,'%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM, B.BRD_NM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.BRD_CD ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC, A.IDX DESC ) AS RN FROM TB_BBS_PST A INNER JOIN TB_BBS_BRD B ON A.BRD_CD = B.BRD_CD AND B.DEL_YN='N' AND B.USE_YN='Y' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.BRD_CD IN (#{brdCdStra}, #{brdCdStre}, #{brdCdDise}, #{brdCdSafe}, #{brdCdSpfe}, #{brdCdTere}, #{brdCdVera}, #{brdCdSdse}) ) T WHERE T.RN <= 9
